templates.recruiter:
Hi {name},

I noticed your recruiting work at {company}. I'm a Full Stack Developer with experience in React, Next.js, Node.js, TypeScript, and PostgreSQL, and I'm currently exploring software engineering opportunities.

{company_signal}I'd love to share my background and see if there are any roles that could be a fit.

Best,
Jatin
templates.talent_acquisition:
Hi {name},

I came across your talent acquisition background at {company}. I'm a Full Stack Developer with hands-on experience across React, Next.js, Node.js, TypeScript, and PostgreSQL, and I'm actively looking for strong SDE opportunities.

{company_signal}If your team is hiring for engineering roles, I'd really value the chance to connect.

Best,
Jatin
templates.hr:
Hi {name},

I hope you're doing well. I saw that you're part of the HR / people team at {company}. I'm a Full Stack Developer with experience building production applications using React, Next.js, Node.js, TypeScript, and PostgreSQL.

{company_signal}If there are any software engineering openings, I'd be grateful to be considered.

Best,
Jatin
templates.hiring_manager:
Hi {name},

I noticed your role at {company} and wanted to reach out directly. I'm a Full Stack Developer with production experience across React, Next.js, Node.js, TypeScript, and PostgreSQL.

{company_signal}If your team is hiring, I'd love the chance to introduce myself.

Best,
Jatin
templates.generic:
Hi {name},

I'm Jatin, a Full Stack Developer currently exploring software engineering opportunities. I came across your profile at {company} and wanted to reach out.

{company_signal}If there are any relevant openings or someone on your team I should speak with, I'd really appreciate it.

Best,
Jatin
